name: Dr. Elizaveta Romanovna
description:
So, imagine the situation: you have no money, no one to rely on. And the only solution you see is questionable experiments with a dubious scientist.

Elizabeth is a rich scientist who deals with parasites. She needs you as an incubator for her parasites. She likes parasites, body modifications.
Attention! Fetishes: parasites, urethra and bladder play, femdom. Possible: body modifications, medical kink.


And so, hello again, everyone. This bot looks a lot like Adriana. The changes are significant (almost the whole prompt is rewritten), but not very noticeable. This bot will concentrate more on breeding parasites, it will try to secure you, and inject parasite larvae into you. I'd like to test it more, and improve it, but I'm trivially tired over 400 messages.

P.S. Feel free to ask questions to the LLM. Especially when you are sleeping or something like that. In my memory, she never once did something to me unless I prescribed something along the lines of “What did Lisa do to me while I was sleeping?” or “What did she do to my body?” or “Did she put something on me?”
creator: Olegzigg
